Nouf Khalid Alhejailan

Data Analyst · Business Intelligence
A motivated and detail-oriented graduate in Computer Information Systems, specializing in data analysis and business intelligence. About Me

I am a recent graduate of Imam Mohammad Ibn Saud Islamic University with a Bachelor's degree in Information Systems. I have hands-on experience in data analysis using tools such as Power BI and Excel, along with leveraging programming languages to process data and develop analytical solutions.

I gained practical experience through my cooperative training at Saudi Electricity Company, as well as through the Tamheer Program at Ministry of Health Saudi Arabia. These experiences strengthened my applied skills and enhanced my understanding of business operations and data-driven decision-making.

In addition, I have participated in various volunteer initiatives and completed specialized courses in Data Analysis and Business Intelligence. I am a fast learner, adaptable, and possess strong communication skills that enable me to effectively contribute to organizational goals.

Projects & Dashboards
Project 01 · Saudi Electricity Company
PASS — Plant Billing & Analytics Dashboard
Developed an interactive Plant Billing & Analytics Dashboard (PASS Project) to analyze energy production and fuel consumption, enabling accurate billing and improved operational efficiency. The dashboard provided clear insights into plant output and fuel usage, supporting data-driven billing processes and informed operational decision-making.
Project 02 · Ministry of Health
Procurement Plan Dashboard
This dashboard provides a comprehensive overview of agency performance across all quarters, while effectively tracking and monitoring competitive processes.
Project 03 · Ministry of Health
Response Dashboard
This dashboard provides a clear overview of clusters and regions, and monitors the highest reported cases. It also categorizes the reports by type, enabling efficient tracking and analysis.
Project 04 · Ministry of Health
Transactions Dashboard
This dashboard provides a comprehensive overview of incoming, outgoing, and newly issued transactions for all departments. It also enables monitoring of departmental performance and ensures smooth and efficient workflow management.
Project 05 · Ministry of Health
Procurement Dashboard
Procurement Dashboard
Project 06 · Ministry of Health
Contracts & Procurement Dashboard
